des: John Schreiber intentionally walks Trevor Larnach.
Trevor Larnach grounds into a double play, shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino. Brooks Lee out at 2nd. Trevor Larnach out at 1st.
Trevor Larnach doubles (1) on a line drive to left fielder Taylor Ward.
Trevor Larnach singles on a ground ball to second baseman Jeremiah Jackson. Matt Wallner scores. Josh Bell to 3rd. Victor Caratini to 2nd.
Trevor Larnach grounds out, second baseman Jeremiah Jackson to first baseman Pete Alonso.
Trevor Larnach flies out to left fielder Taylor Ward.
